factory.label: Our Factory
factory.title: State-of-the-Art Manufacturing
factory.desc: Our 80,000 m² production base houses 8 automated production lines with an annual capacity of 50,000 tons. From silicone synthesis to finished product packaging, every step is precisely controlled and monitored.
features: Real-time quality monitoring at every production stage

quality.label: Quality Control
quality.title: Every Batch, Rigorously Tested
quality.desc: Our CNAS-accredited lab conducts 12 mandatory tests on every production batch — from tensile strength and elongation to UV aging and chemical resistance. Nothing ships without passing.
features: 12 mandatory quality tests per production batch
Full traceability from raw material to finished product

partners.label: Our Network

partners.desc: We work with specialized factories across China to bring you the best products in every category. Each partner is carefully vetted for quality, reliability, and certifications.

about.label: About Us
about.title: About Shengyu Industrial
about.desc: Since 2002 — a direct factory manufacturer of furniture, building materials, hardware, lighting, and industrial cleaning products.
about.storyP1: Founded in 2002, Shengyu Industrial is a comprehensive manufacturer integrating R&D, manufacturing, and global distribution across five core product lines. Headquartered in Guangzhou, we operate an 80,000 m² modern production facility.
about.storyP2: Our CNAS-accredited laboratory houses world-class testing equipment and R&D instrumentation, supported by 20+ national patents. Our product portfolio spans furniture, building adhesives & sealants, LED lighting, construction hardware, and industrial cleaning solutions.
about.storyP3: For over two decades, Shengyu Industrial has been driven by technological innovation and defined by product quality — delivering reliable, factory-direct products to 3,200+ clients worldwide.
about.journeyDesc: Over two decades of relentless progress — every step has been purposeful and resolute.

timeline.title: Company Founded
timeline.desc: Shengyu Industrial was established in Guangzhou, starting as a building materials trading business.

timeline.title: Production Launch
timeline.desc: Commissioned our first manufacturing line, transitioning from trading to production.

timeline.title: Product Diversification
timeline.desc: Expanded beyond building materials into furniture and hardware — laying the foundation for a multi-category portfolio.

timeline.title: National Expansion
timeline.desc: Built a nationwide sales network serving over 300 enterprise clients across China.

timeline.title: New Product Lines
timeline.desc: Launched LED lighting and industrial cleaning product lines, completing our five-category offering.

timeline.title: Going Global
timeline.desc: Expanded exports to Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa — beginning our global journey.

values.title: Mission
values.desc: To empower global buyers with factory-direct quality products at competitive prices.

values.title: Vision
values.desc: To become a world-class multi-category manufacturer and trusted export partner.

values.title: Core Values
values.desc: Integrity first, quality foremost, innovation-driven, win-win collaboration.

values.title: Core Competency
values.desc: 25 years of manufacturing expertise, multi-category product portfolio, end-to-end quality control.

about.tagline: We eliminate the middleman markup, but keep the middleman services you actually need.
